_comment: Copy to mcp.json and edit. Each server is stdio (command/args[/env]) or remote (url[/headers]). Guardrails per server: disabled, allowedTools (whitelist), readOnly (drop write-ish tools). Only add servers you trust — their tools run under your credentials.

mcpServers._fetch_note: Recommended: lets Victoria read web pages. Pair with her built-in DuckDuckGo search for real-time info. Needs uv/uvx; if uvx isn't available, `pip install mcp-server-fetch` and use command '<your .venv>/bin/python' with args ['-m','mcp_server_fetch'].
